race.comment: MIDNIGHT DYNAMITE (12) massive performance from the wide gate when he failed to make it four-straight victories with a gritty on-pace second to COOL JAKEY over 1300m here. Gets the right run with the sharp weight drop and undefeated in two starts at this trip. Ready to go to the next level. ZABIARI (4) imported entire making his Australian debut . Fitted with the two solid trials and is a Group 3 winner over the 1600m in France. Can get the job done with Rawiller aboard from the low draw. COOL JAKEY (8) has a good record over this track and trip and has the speed to get over from the wide gate. Strips fitter and has the ability to play a leading role. POINT AND SHOOT (13) stakes placed gelding who will get back in the run and be ridden for luck from the wide draw. Ready for this trip and further now and look for him savaging the line. MIGHTY ULYSSES (14) had mixed fortunes with the big weights this time in and won't know himself with just the 53.5kg today. Well drawn and don't dismiss.
